approval_config.description: Defines the approval configuration for the build trigger, specifying whether manual approval is required before running the build.

bitbucket_server_trigger_config.description: Defines the configuration for integrating a Bitbucket Server repository, including repository details and authentication settings.
bitbucket_server_trigger_config.type: list(object({bitbucket_server_config_resource: string,project_key: string,repo_slug: string,pull_request: list(object({branch: string,comment_control: optional(string),invert_regex: optional(bool)})),push: list(object({branch: optional(string),invert_regex: optional(bool),tag: optional(string)}))}))

build.description: Specifies the build configuration to execute, including required steps, options, and source settings.

description.description: Specifies the description of the Cloud Build trigger, providing context or details about its purpose or functionality.

disabled.description: Determines whether the Cloud Build trigger is disabled; set to true to disable execution.

filename.description: Specifies the path to the build configuration file in the repository, such as a Dockerfile or cloudbuild.yaml.

filter.description: Defines the criteria for triggering builds, using a CEL expression to match repository events.

git_file_source.description: Specifies the location of the Cloud Build configuration file in the repository, including the file path and branch or tag.
git_file_source.type: list(object({bitbucket_server_config: optional(string),github_enterprise_config: optional(string),path: string,repo_type: string,repository: optional(string),revision: optional(string),uri: optional(string)}))

github.description: Configuration for the GitHub repository, including repository name and owner details, required for setting up the Cloud Build trigger.
github.type: list(object({enterprise_config_resource_name: optional(string),name: optional(string),owner: optional(string),pull_request: list(object({branch: string,comment_control: optional(string),invert_regex: optional(bool)})),push: list(object({branch: optional(string),invert_regex: optional(bool),tag: optional(string)}))}))

ignored_files.description: Patterns for files to be ignored by the build trigger; supports glob syntax.

include_build_logs.description: Specifies whether build logs should be included in the trigger notifications; requires a boolean value.

included_files.description: Specifies the files or directories to include in the trigger, using glob patterns; at least one match is required for the trigger to run.

location.description: Specifies the region where the Cloud Build trigger is created; must match the location of the associated resources.

name.description: Specifies the unique name of the Cloud Build trigger, which must be unique within the project and adhere to naming conventions.

pubsub_config.description: Specifies the Pub/Sub configuration that triggers the build, including the topic and optional filters.

repository_event_config.description: Defines the repository event configuration, specifying the repository and event type that trigger the build.
repository_event_config.type: list(object({repository: optional(string),pull_request: list(object({branch: optional(string),comment_control: optional(string),invert_regex: optional(bool)})),push: list(object({branch: optional(string),invert_regex: optional(bool),tag: optional(string)}))}))

service_account.description: Specifies the email of the service account to be used for the Cloud Build trigger; must have necessary permissions to execute builds.

source_to_build.description: Specifies the source repository and branch or tag to build from; must match the configuration of the Cloud Build trigger.
source_to_build.type: list(object({bitbucket_server_config: optional(string),github_enterprise_config: optional(string),ref: string,repo_type: string,repository: optional(string),uri: optional(string)}))

substitutions.description: Key-value pairs used to substitute variables in the build configuration, allowing dynamic customization of build steps.

tags.description: List of tags to associate with the Cloud Build trigger for organizational or filtering purposes.

timeouts.description: Defines the amount of time to wait for the Cloud Build trigger operation to complete, with optional configuration for create, update, and delete actions.

trigger_template.description: Defines the repository and branch or tag to monitor for changes that will trigger the build.
trigger_template.type: list(object({branch_name: optional(string),commit_sha: optional(string),dir: optional(string),invert_regex: optional(bool),project_id: optional(string),repo_name: optional(string),tag_name: optional(string)}))

webhook_config.description: Defines the configuration for a webhook trigger, including authentication and resource requirements for Cloud Build integration.
